findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "list_states" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: List every US state that has treatment facility data in this directory, with per-state facility counts. Returns an array of {state, stateAbbr, count}. Use as a …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
